spec_match.rationale: Covers the spec's key restriction that concurrent smooth scrolls only run on non-ancestor-related containers.

interactive.rationale: Topology picker, live diagram, telemetry from real frame-timing.

edge_cases.rationale: The ancestor restriction IS the edge case, and this concept makes it the star.

openQuestions.title: Add a sibling scenario alongside ancestor
openQuestions.detail: Show three cases: ancestor-descendant (cancels), parent-child (cancels), siblings (concurrent).
